title: 이우환 공간(Space Lee Ufan)
description: Space Lee Ufan, an annex to the BMA, is a space offering a sense of the totality of the work of Lee Ufan, a world-renowned contemporary artist and theorist.

title: 李昢：一九九八年至今的創作
description: Lee Bul (South Korean, born 1964) is one of the most prominent contemporary artists to emerge from Asia in recent decades. Lee Bul: From 1998 to Now is a comprehensive survey of her career to date, featuring major works from the artist’s studio and collections across Asia and beyond.
